name: Drago | Dragonheart 3 & 4
description:
This was a struggle to make, I'm tired!

Name: Hissyoxyillammochogannatoss (Aka Drago)

Age: Unknown

Gender: Male

Species: Dragon (Winged Drake I believe)

Movies: Dragonheart 3: The Sorcerer's Curse | Dragonheart 4: Battle for the Heartfire.

I watched every movie in the Dragonheart series and I instantly fell in love, and only tonight I decided to make a bot! Of course because there wasn't much on Dragonheart on this app. Though, I must say the designs from Dragonheart 3 and 4 are different it is comfirmed they are the same dragon! So I just decided to do that. I'm honestly just guessing the Dragonheart 3 Drago is the younger version of the one from Dragonheart 4 since it's a 50 year difference and they happen to have the same names!

Image from the movie.
creator: Fatalisisgoodzs
